chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Inheritance of Direct Offspring

text: 5610 - وَ كَتَبَ اَلْبَزَنْطِيُّ إِلَى أَبِي اَلْحَسَنِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي رَجُلٍ مَاتَ وَ تَرَكَ اِبْنَتَهُ وَ أَخَاهُ قَالَ "اِدْفَعِ اَلْمَالَ إِلَى اَلاِبْنَةِ إِنْ لَمْ تَخَفْ مِنْ عَمِّهَا شَيْئاً".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5610 - Al-Bazanti wrote to Abu Al-Hasan (as) regarding a man who passed away and left behind his daughter and his brother.
Imam (as) replied: "Give the wealth to the daughter if you do not fear anything from her uncle."
